_comment: Tutorial step 'welcome' as a cinematic (task: 'Frank cinematics should be used for most of the tutorial phases... this is a good place to start adding shop flavor'). Frank slides in sideways from behind the glass card case near the register, rather than the flat horizontal glide-from-offscreen every other scene uses - first thing the player ever sees, so it's the natural place to establish the shop's physical space. Register's y is deliberately NOT the same as case's - the register sits ON the counter (its own base has no table/legs, see CutscenePlayer._make_register_texture), so its center is offset upward by half the counter's on-screen height plus half the register's own, against a ~648px reference viewport height (CutscenePlayer._viewport_size()'s own fallback default): case scale 2 * 30px tex = 60px tall (half=30px=0.046 of 648) register scale 2 * 20px tex = 40px tall (half=20px=0.031) -> register.y = case.y - 0.046 - 0.031.

steps.name: Frank
steps.text: Hey! You made it. I'm Frank - I run this place.

steps.name: Frank
steps.text: That the birthday PixBot? Solid starter frame.

steps.name: Frank
steps.text: Corp sponsors our trainer table so new pilots can learn without scratching the paint. Hop on, I'll walk you through it.
